---
title: "Logit-normal t Sampling"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.method-page}
# Logit-normal Time Sampling

Instead of sampling time uniformly, OceanLens tested:

$$
u\sim\mathcal{N}(\mu_t,\sigma_t^2),\qquad t=\sigma(u).
$$

This concentrates training on more informative intermediate states, where the sample is neither pure noise nor already
almost the target residual. It is one of the key choices in `v4_s1_logit_t`.

Reference: [Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.02747).
:::
